Pusat Penjagaan Orang Tua Sentosa 聖淘沙世緣 老人服务中心

# Pusat Penjagaan Orang Tua Sentosa 聖淘沙世緣 老人服务中心

No. 101, Jalan Dato Yusof Shah Budin 21, Taman Sentosa 41200 Klang, Selangor Darul Ehsan. Person in Charge: Richard Lee (016-260 7778)

## Friday, 16 February 2018

  

### [About Us](https://klangsentosaoldfolkshome.blogspot.com/2018/02/about-us.html)

[![](https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEiQQiQB7Df-aJCpJ77H8-lFtv-6j2RgyOwy_K1nVuLJfph82Cph87aGh9Ga-o5nO53EGWdXZ988pzJQ2WXCK7s9PsHtx9lIwDigpI-CXbkw91SZ0fQZ379imabNwrZve0v1mmP-sHYaAVU/s400/28116917_1979691535404446_1262170517_n1.jpg)](https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEiQQiQB7Df-aJCpJ77H8-lFtv-6j2RgyOwy_K1nVuLJfph82Cph87aGh9Ga-o5nO53EGWdXZ988pzJQ2WXCK7s9PsHtx9lIwDigpI-CXbkw91SZ0fQZ379imabNwrZve0v1mmP-sHYaAVU/s1600/28116917_1979691535404446_1262170517_n1.jpg)

  

Pusat Penjagaan Orang Tua Sentosa was established in May 2014. Mr Chong Kam Weng, the landlord of this single storey corner house, is very kind to allow us to take in old folks of Chinese and Indian Origin and house them under this roof.

  

Being a semi charity home, we don't set a fix fee. We rely on whatever contributions each old folk can contribute to keep this Home running. The care giver, Mr Richard Lee who has been in this nursing home industry for the past 20 years, together with his friend and partner, Mr Tan Tiong Wee, took up this task to take care of old folks who are bed-ridden and those whose family could not manage.

  

The Home whose location is not so exposed to outsiders, rely a lot on friend's support with a staff of three Indonesian maids. We take care of 14 old folks around the clock.

  

For further enquiries, Richard Lee can be contacted at 016-260 7778. Immediate replies assured.
